subject: [PATCH 3/8] nfs/localio: fix ref leak on nfs_uuid_add_file failure

2026-06-01.patch_summary: This patch fixes a reference leak in the NFS/localio code when nfs_uuid_add_file() fails. The issue occurs when nfs_uuid_put() tears down uuid->net while nfs_uuid_add_file() is still racing, causing the function to return -ENXIO without publishing nfl->nfs_uuid via rcu_assign_pointer(). As a result, the caller-owned file reference and its net reference are leaked, blocking nfsd_net and netns teardown. The patch fixes this by releasing the caller-owned file ref and its net ref through the existing helper, using a stack-local RCU pointer to xchg it out, and returning -ENXIO so callers do not dereference a localio whose slot has been cleared.
